issue_summary: Implement : add `MapperFeature.BLOCK_UNSAFE_POLYMORPHIC_BASE_TYPES` for stricter validation for default typing
javadoc_after:
/** * Simple accessor for default {@link PolymorphicTypeValidator} to use for * legacy Default Typing methods ({@code ObjectMapper.enableDefaultTyping()}) * and annotation based enabling. *

* Since 2.11 will also check {@link MapperFeature#BLOCK_UNSAFE_POLYMORPHIC_BASE_TYPES} * to possibly override default to more restrictive implementation, see * {@link com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.jsontype.DefaultBaseTypeLimitingValidator}). * * @since 2.10 */
